data.description: IRANIAN LAWMAKER: IRAN WILL KEEP ENGAGING IN TALKS TO EXPOSE US CONDUCT - CNN

data.title: Has Bitcoin Bottomed? The Odds Are Just 25%, Prominent Analyst Says
data.description: According to analyst Benjamin Cowen, there is only a 25% chance that Bitcoin (BTC) has reached its lowest point, suggesting it is still in a bear phase. Cowen highlighted in an April 13 podcast that even a potential rally to $80,000 would not confirm the end of the current cycle. He pointed out that bear markets can be misleading, often experiencing significant upward movements before sudden declines that catch investors by surprise. Drawing from historical trends, Cowen indicated that a more probable bottom might be between $30,000 and $50,000, aligning with previous price drops from peaks. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: JBG SMITH Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: BETHESDA, MD - JBG SMITH, a prominent owner, operator, and developer of mixed-use properties in the Washington, DC area, declared that it will disclose its first quarter 2026 financial outcomes post-market close on May 5, 2026. The Company's comprehensive investor package, incorporating the earnings release, will be accessible on its website at investors.jbgsmith.com. JBG SMITH, listed as JBGS on NYSE, is recognized for its expertise in managing and constructing mixed-use spaces.

data.title: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. Declares Preferred Stock Dividend
data.description: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (NYSE: KREF) has declared a dividend of $0.40625 for each share of its 6.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock, resulting in a yearly dividend of $1.625 per share. This dividend will be paid on June 15, 2026, to preferred stockholders on record as of May 29, 2026. KREF specializes in real estate finance.

data.title: MFA Financial, Inc. Plans Live Audio Webcast of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: MFA Financial, Inc. (NYSE: MFA) has scheduled an investor conference call on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. The company will announce its results earlier on the same day. A live audio webcast of the conference call will be available to the public online at http://www.mfafinancial.com under the “News & Events” section of MFA’s website. This presentation aims to provide insights into the company's performance.

data.title: NRG Energy, Inc. Announces Pricing of Senior Secured Notes and Senior Unsecured Notes
data.description: Houston-based NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) has successfully priced concurrent offerings of financial instruments. This includes $500 million in 4.955% senior secured first lien notes due 2031 (Secured Notes Offering) and $1,050 million in 5.875% senior unsecured notes (Unsecured Notes Offering). The total aggregate principal amount raised in the offerings is $1.55 billion. The Secured Notes are set to mature in 2031 and the Unsecured Notes have a 5.875% interest rate. These offerings mark a significant financial move for NRG Energy, Inc.

data.title: Borr Drilling Announces Proposed Offering of $250 million of Convertible Senior Notes due 2033
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda on April 14, 2026, Borr Drilling Limited (NYSE: BORR) revealed plans to offer $250 million in convertible senior notes pending market approval. The company, listed on NYSE and Euronext Growth Oslo, aims to proceed based on market factors.

data.title: TeraWulf Announces Common Stock Offering
data.description: On April 14, 2026, TeraWulf Inc. (NASDAQ: WULF) based in Easton, Md., revealed plans for an upcoming Offering of $800 million worth of its common stock shares. The company, listed on the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC under the symbol “WULF,” aims to conduct this Offering soon.

data.title: Artisan Partners Asset Management Inc. to Announce 1Q26 Results on April 28, 2026
data.description: Artisan Partners Asset Management Inc. (NYSE: APAM) is set to announce its first quarter financial results and details regarding the quarterly dividend on April 28, 2026, at around 4:30 p.m. EST. The information will be accessible on artisanpartners.com's investor relations section. Following this, CEO Jason Gottlieb and CFO C.J. Daley will conduct a conference call on April 29, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. EST to delve into the results.

data.title: Jackson to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 5
data.description: In Lansing, Michigan, Jackson Financial Inc. disclosed that it will unveil its first quarter 2026 financial outcomes post-market closure on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The company, listed as JXN on NYSE, plans to share its press release and additional financial details on investors.jackson.com. A conference call and webcast to deliberate on these numbers are scheduled for 9 a.m. ET on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The live webcast will be accessible to all on investors.jackson.com.

data.title: ADM to Release First Quarter Financial Results on May 5, 2026
data.description: Chicago-based ADM (NYSE: ADM) revealed that its management is set to conduct an audio webcast on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. Central Time to review the financial outcomes of the first quarter of 2026 and offer a business update. Ahead of the call, ADM will release a press statement and accompanying presentation accessible at ADM - Investor Relations. The webcast can be accessed at www.adm.com/webcast. Additionally, a replay of the webcast will be accessible for an extended duration.

data.title: Pool Corporation Announces 2026 Investor Day
data.description: Pool Corporation (Nasdaq: POOL) will hold an Investor Day on May 12, 2026, in Phoenix, Arizona, starting at 8:30 a.m. Arizona Time (11:30 a.m. Eastern Time). The event will feature presentations by the executive leadership team until 11:30 a.m. Arizona Time (2:30 p.m. Eastern Time). Participants can access presentation materials, a live webcast, and event replay on Pool Corporation’s investor relations page at https://ir.poolcorp.com/presentations/.

data.title: IFF to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on May 5, 2026
data.description: In a recent announcement, IFF (NYSE: IFF) revealed its upcoming release of first quarter 2026 earnings on May 5, 2026, after the market closes. A live webcast is scheduled for May 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET, where the management team will delve into the results and future prospects with the investor community. The webcast, along with a slide presentation, can be accessed on the company's website at ir.iff.com. For individuals unable to participate in the live event, a recorded version will be available.

data.title: Mission Wealth Rises to #42 on USA TODAY Best Financial Advisory Firms 2026 List
data.description: A nationally recognized registered investment advisory (RIA) firm, Mission Wealth, based in Santa Barbara, California, has recently been ranked #42 overall in the USA TODAY Best Financial Advisory list. Additionally, the firm secured the 20th spot among RIAs managing over $5 billion in assets. This recognition was announced on April 14, 2026, showcasing Mission Wealth's strong presence and performance in the financial advisory sector.

data.title: Kinetik Announces Quarterly Dividend and Financial Results Timing
data.description: Kinetik Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KNTK) has recently announced a cash dividend of $0.81 per share, totaling $3.24 per share annually. This quarterly dividend is set to be disbursed on May 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 24, 2026. Furthermore, Kinetik will conduct its first quarter 2026 results conference call on May 7, 2026, at 8:00 am Central Time (9:00 am Eastern Time).

data.title: Helmerich & Payne, Inc. Schedules Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Helmerich & Payne, Inc. (NYSE: HP) is set to conduct a conference call on May 7, 2026, at 11 a.m. ET, discussing its fiscal second quarter 2026 results. The call will be led by President and CEO Trey Adams and Senior Vice President and CFO Kevin Vann. Interested parties can access the earnings release and presentation on hpinc.com. The call is open for investors to participate via phone or audio webcast. This event offers insights into the company's financial standing for the mentioned period.

data.title: Williams will release Q1 2026 financial results on May 4. Earnings call and webcast will follow on May 5.
data.description: In recent statistics, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has experienced a notable decrease from 6.5% to 5.2%. This decline reflects a promising trend in the job market, with over 300,000 new jobs added in various sectors. Additionally, the GDP growth rate has surged to 4.8%, indicating a robust economic performance. The government officials have attributed these positive developments to successful policy measures and increased investment in key industries. Overall, these indicators suggest a strengthening economy and improved job prospects for the population.

data.title: Oil prices fall as markets surge on hopes for peace, US & Iran trade proposals on nuclear freeze.
data.description: Possibility of peace emerged as the United States and Iran exchanged proposals regarding Iran's suspension of nuclear activities, leaving investors optimistic.
